channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Collapsing wall, 10th May
item.description:
I have serious concerns that this wall pillar is going to collapse on a passer by and seriously hurt them. It is on the top of Fordel Road facing a public footpath and a very busy Torridon road. Lots of school children pass daily.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Torridon Road, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2b Dyne Road, 10th May
item.description:
Dumped Sofa.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn High Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Dog Poo, Fly Tipping and Abandoned Vehicle, 10th May
item.description:
Dog poo on the pavement, lots of dumped bin bags next to an abandoned car with flat tires and broken windows that has been there for months.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): New North Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Steps broken to play area, 10th May
item.description:
Steps to play area rusted and broken to the point there is sharp ragged edges

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Hall Road, Crofton, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 349 Kilburn High Road, 10th May
item.description:
Dumped rubbish.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn High Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Fly Tipping Not Cleared, 10th May
item.description:
I reported fly tipping on my road last week, but the case has been marked as resolved even though the rubbish is still there. Could you please reopen the case and arrange for it to be cleared? Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garrick Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: McDonald’s and Popeye’s receipts on the pavement, 10th May
item.description:
They both use sticker receipts which are littering the pavement and roads. How can you allow them to use these which are becoming ingrained into the pavement and roads on Kingsland Road, Ashwin St and Abbot St

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ashwin Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Popeyes fly tipping, 10th May
item.description:
Popeyes are regularly fly tipping. Please see image of a delivery crate which has been on the pavement for approximately a week. Please fine them so they refrain from doing this

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ashwin Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing Rubbish by Copperbox tesco, 10th May
item.description:
Rubbish still consistently overflowing and blowing round the street. Its leading to anti social behaviour as teens are smashing all the bottles that are left. Bins need massively upgrading or removed, its causing an unsafe environment for residents.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tandy Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegally parked on the pavement, 10th May
item.description:
Not only illegally parked on the pavement, the rider was returning to his bike and was spitting in the corner of Ashwin and Abbot Street. I asked him to not park there and to not spit and other pedestrians responded in support. Please sort this problem!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ashwin Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside lister court, 10th May
item.description:
Has been on the street for a long time, includes furniture and clothes. Issue worsens the longer time goes on

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brett Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking for long periods in loading bay, 10th May
item.description:
How are these bikes permitted to park for long periods in the loading bay?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland High Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture Dumped on Pavement, 10th May
item.description:
A load of old furniture and scrap wood has been dumped on the pavement on Plumstead High Street near the junction with Wickham Lane, near lamppost 70P1135. Given the ongoing roadworks in this area this is a significant problem for people trying to get along this part of the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car - mouldy, 10th May
item.description:
This car has been parked here, without moving, for a number of weeks. The car is mouldy on the inside and is taking up a valuable parking space.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hawksley Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street cone debris, 10th May
item.description:
Cone base left in road

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 10th May
item.description:
Van been left unrepaired on side of street for 6 months plus. no sign of movement or owner.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Montcalm Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken equipment causing injurt, 10th May
item.description:
The car piece of equipment appears to have been broken in previous days as the broken parts had been removed yet the structure remained open for use. This has resulted in a child falling between the structure resulting in a very bad scrape as you will see in the photos. I hadn't been to the playground in a while and general condition of the whole playground (structures and flooring) is actually shocking and very dangerous and in need of urgent repairs. The injury was not even to my own child but one in my care.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Way, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The road is in an unsuitable and not safe for all vehicles and cyclists, road accidents can happen when tiring to avoid the poor road surface, 10th May
item.description:
The length of the road is not suitable for road users
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vicarage Road, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag left on pavement, 10th May
item.description:
As per image

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sanford Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 10th May
item.description:
Litter dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ruston Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet
